text: App crashes with SIGSEGV when opening files larger than 2 GB. Stack trace: #0 read_buffer() #1 process_file()
Feature request: add keyboard shortcuts for common actions. Would be nice to have Ctrl+S for save and Ctrl+F for search.
Regression since v2.1: authentication fails with 401 for all users. This worked in v2.0. Bisected to commit abc123.
The API documentation for /v1/search is missing the response schema. The examples in the README are outdated.
Memory usage grows unboundedly when processing streaming data. OOM after ~30 minutes. Tested on 3 machines.
Cannot reproduce: issue #234 says login fails but I cannot reproduce with the steps given. Please provide more info.
Duplicate of #512. The null pointer crash on empty input was already fixed in the dev branch.
Internal compiler error: assertion failed at line 842 in codegen.cpp. Affects all versions.
Add dark mode support. Many users have requested this. Could use CSS variables for theming.
Stack overflow when parsing deeply nested JSON. Happens with depth > 1000. Used to work in v1.x.
Question: what is the recommended way to configure the timeout for background jobs?
Refactor: the authentication module has grown too large. Suggest splitting into auth_core.py and auth_oauth.py.
